endpoints.description: Douban book subject suggestion JSON. Use it to resolve a book title to the canonical subject id/url before detail and review collection.
strategy_notes: Use the first exact title/author match to get the canonical book subject URL.
Then call the subject detail page and review/comment pages through browser_api_call instead of navigating repeatedly.

endpoints.description: Douban subject detail HTML. browser_api_call compacts title, author/creator, publisher/label, publish year/date, rating, rating count, ISBN/barcode, and genre fields.
strategy_notes: Use subject detail HTML once after resolving or receiving a subject URL.
For book tasks, the compact detail is enough for title, author, publisher, publish year, rating, and rating count.

endpoints.description: Douban review/comment list HTML. browser_api_call compacts visible review/comment rows with user, title, rating label, date, votes/useful count, and text snippets.
strategy_notes: For top 10 review tasks, call /reviews?sort=hotest once and use the first 10 compact review rows.
For 100 short-comment tasks, call /comments/?start=0,20,40,60,80&limit=20&status=P&sort=score and save the compact rows.

runtime_strategies.name: douban_subject_detail_reviews_contract
runtime_strategies.trigger: Douban book/movie/music tasks asking for subject details plus top reviews, comments, rating, or rating count.

actions.description: Resolve the subject id with book subject_suggest when needed, or use the subject URL already given in the task.
Fetch compact subject details and review/comment list pages.

observable_validation: Subject detail title/author match the requested book, movie, or album.
Review/comment compact rows include text snippets before saving JSON.
notes: Use HTTP compact pages before DOM navigation; Douban list pages are mostly static HTML and batch well.
